sentences.zh: 当时的其他评论者也讲述了类似的故事。

blocks.html_en: Looking at my troubled young adult years, this Rap Music story reminds me of the music that influenced me. I wonder if my understanding of the world was shaped by the music I listened to.

sentences.en: Looking at my troubled young adult years, this Rap Music story reminds me of the music that influenced me.
sentences.zh: 回顾我陷入困境的年轻成年岁月，这个说唱音乐故事让我想起了影响我的音乐。

sentences.en: I wonder if my understanding of the world was shaped by the music I listened to.
sentences.zh: 我想知道我对世界的理解是否是由我听的音乐塑造的。

blocks.html_en: Presentation Research: Music as a generational way to express the difficulties of our time. As an aside, are we lacking political music in our current era?

sentences.en: Presentation Research: Music as a generational way to express the difficulties of our time.
sentences.zh: 演讲研究：音乐作为表达我们这个时代困难的代际方式。

sentences.en: As an aside, are we lacking political music in our current era?
sentences.zh: 顺便问一下，我们这个时代是否缺乏政治音乐？

blocks.html_en: This story, true or not, reminds me of what is happening with the pervasive parts of technology. Always-online systems and services gather data, and this data is slowly used to shape society without our knowledge or consent.

sentences.en: This story, true or not, reminds me of what is happening with the pervasive parts of technology.
sentences.zh: 这个故事，无论真实与否，都让我想起了技术无处不在的部分正在发生的事情。

sentences.en: Always-online systems and services gather data, and this data is slowly used to shape society without our knowledge or consent.
sentences.zh: 始终在线的系统和服务收集数据，这些数据在我们不知情或未经同意的情况下慢慢地被用来塑造社会。

blocks.html_en: March 1971: Daniel Ellsberg, released the Pentagon Papers. Nixon used his position to go after him and cover it up. Nixon resigned after public pressure.

sentences.en: March 1971: Daniel Ellsberg, released the Pentagon Papers.
sentences.zh: 1971 年 3 月：丹尼尔·埃尔斯伯格 (Daniel Ellsberg) 公布了五角大楼文件。

sentences.en: Nixon used his position to go after him and cover it up.
sentences.zh: 尼克松利用自己的职位来追捕他并掩盖事实。

sentences.en: Nixon resigned after public pressure.
sentences.zh: 尼克松在公众压力下辞职。

blocks.html_en: NOW: We have an administration that, as far as I can tell, is operating unlawfully with complete impunity. And neither party in congress is willing to stop it.

sentences.en: NOW: We have an administration that, as far as I can tell, is operating unlawfully with complete impunity.
sentences.zh: 现在：据我所知，我们的政府正在非法运作而完全不受惩罚。

sentences.en: And neither party in congress is willing to stop it.
sentences.zh: 国会中的两党都不愿意阻止。

blocks.html_en:
Think about where we’re are right now
…to where we were fifty years ago.

sentences.en: Think about where we’re are right now …to where we were fifty years ago.
sentences.zh: 想想我们现在所处的位置……五十年前的位置。

blocks.html_en: Consumerism has slowly taken over our way of life. Now we are confronted with an Authoritarian political and financial system that works together to disenfranchise its own people.

sentences.en: Consumerism has slowly taken over our way of life.
sentences.zh: 消费主义已经慢慢占据了我们的生活方式。

sentences.en: Now we are confronted with an Authoritarian political and financial system that works together to disenfranchise its own people.
sentences.zh: 现在我们面临着一个独裁的政治和金融体系，它共同剥夺本国人民的选举权。

blocks.html_en: Consumerism has been impacting society slowly over time for the last 50 years. With our limited understanding of how this data is used, we have been largely driving down this road unaware.

sentences.en: Consumerism has been impacting society slowly over time for the last 50 years.
sentences.zh: 过去 50 年来，消费主义一直在缓慢地影响着社会。

sentences.en: With our limited understanding of how this data is used, we have been largely driving down this road unaware.
sentences.zh: 由于我们对如何使用这些数据的了解有限，我们基本上在不知不觉中沿着这条路行驶。

blocks.html_en: Ethics of technology

sentences.en: Ethics of technology
sentences.zh: 技术伦理

blocks.html_en: Ethics of technology relates to:

sentences.en: Ethics of technology relates to:
sentences.zh: 技术伦理涉及：

blocks.html_en: • Hardware/Software Design Impact: How our choices and behavior become affected by the design and implementation of technology (Is technology being designed to prevent choice?).

sentences.en: Hardware/Software Design Impact: How our choices and behavior become affected by the design and implementation of technology (Is technology being designed to prevent choice?).
sentences.zh: 硬件/软件设计影响：我们的选择和行为如何受到技术设计和实施的影响（技术的设计是为了阻止选择吗？）。

blocks.html_en: • Human-technology relations Impact:How technology impacts social relationships (Example: are there surveillance aspects of technology that cause a fear of speaking out?)

sentences.en: Human-technology relations Impact:How technology impacts social relationships (Example: are there surveillance aspects of technology that cause a fear of speaking out?)
sentences.zh: 人与技术的关系影响：技术如何影响社会关系（例如：技术的监视方面是否会导致人们不敢说出来？）

blocks.html_en: In my profession I:

sentences.en: In my profession I:
sentences.zh: 在我的职业中我：

blocks.html_en: • Perform risk assessments of technology: When I find harmful features I recommend competing alternatives, or provide a report to my customers on my concerns

sentences.en: Perform risk assessments of technology: When I find harmful features I recommend competing alternatives, or provide a report to my customers on my concerns
sentences.zh: 对技术进行风险评估：当我发现有害功能时，我会推荐竞争性替代方案，或者就我的担忧向客户提供报告

blocks.html_en: • Observe how technology shapes human behavior: I write about how harmful technology impacts culture and human agency

sentences.en: Observe how technology shapes human behavior: I write about how harmful technology impacts culture and human agency
sentences.zh: 观察技术如何塑造人类行为：我写的是有害技术如何影响文化和人类机构

blocks.html_en: • First-party = companies like Google or Amazon that offer influence-related services to organizations that want to advertise to consumers (You)

sentences.en: First-party = companies like Google or Amazon that offer influence-related services to organizations that want to advertise to consumers (You)
sentences.zh: 第一方=像谷歌或亚马逊这样的公司，为想要向消费者（你）做广告的组织提供与影响力相关的服务

blocks.html_en: • Second-party = Advertisers, or any institution that pays a First-party to gather data for profit

sentences.en: Second-party = Advertisers, or any institution that pays a First-party to gather data for profit
sentences.zh: 第二方 = 广告商或任何向第一方付费以收集数据以获取利润的机构

blocks.html_en: • Third-party = Consumers

sentences.en: Third-party = Consumers
sentences.zh: 第三方=消费者

blocks.html_en: Why am I doing this?

sentences.en: Why am I doing this?
sentences.zh: 我为什么要这样做？

blocks.html_en: (good question, LoL JK)

sentences.en: (good question, LoL JK)
sentences.zh: （好问题，哈哈 JK）

blocks.html_en: • Freedom: I like being free to decide what I want to see on my computer; by extension, I want my customers to also have that choice (Currently that’s not the case)

sentences.en: Freedom: I like being free to decide what I want to see on my computer; by extension, I want my customers to also have that choice (Currently that’s not the case)
sentences.zh: 自由：我喜欢自由地决定我想在计算机上看到什么；推而广之，我希望我的客户也有这样的选择（目前情况并非如此）

blocks.html_en: Freedom: I like being free to decide what I want to see on my computer; by extension, I want my customers to also have that choice (Currently that’s not the case)

sentences.en: Freedom: I like being free to decide what I want to see on my computer; by extension, I want my customers to also have that choice (Currently that’s not the case)
sentences.zh: 自由：我喜欢自由地决定我想在计算机上看到什么；推而广之，我希望我的客户也有这样的选择（目前情况并非如此）

blocks.html_en: • Responsibility: I want technology to be designed around principles that benefits humanity, not destroys it. I want society to have a say in how our technology progresses

sentences.en: Responsibility: I want technology to be designed around principles that benefits humanity, not destroys it.
sentences.zh: 责任：我希望技术的设计围绕造福人类而不是毁灭人类的原则。

sentences.en: I want society to have a say in how our technology progresses
sentences.zh: 我希望社会对我们的技术进步有发言权

blocks.html_en: Responsibility: I want technology to be designed around principles that benefits humanity, not destroys it. I want society to have a say in how our technology progresses

sentences.en: Responsibility: I want technology to be designed around principles that benefits humanity, not destroys it.
sentences.zh: 责任：我希望技术的设计围绕造福人类而不是毁灭人类的原则。

sentences.en: I want society to have a say in how our technology progresses
sentences.zh: 我希望社会对我们的技术进步有发言权

blocks.html_en: • I care about my daughter’s future: I want to do something about this for the future generation.

sentences.en: I care about my daughter’s future: I want to do something about this for the future generation.
sentences.zh: 我关心我女儿的未来：我想为下一代做点什么。

blocks.html_en: I care about my daughter’s future: I want to do something about this for the future generation.

sentences.en: I care about my daughter’s future: I want to do something about this for the future generation.
sentences.zh: 我关心我女儿的未来：我想为下一代做点什么。

blocks.html_en: • Making my life harder: It’s more difficult to support my customers’ objectives when technology is designed specifically to obscure choice to push people into harmful/unwelcome products and services later on when you are unaware

sentences.en: Making my life harder: It’s more difficult to support my customers’ objectives when technology is designed specifically to obscure choice to push people into harmful/unwelcome products and services later on when you are unaware
sentences.zh: 让我的生活变得更加困难：当技术专门设计用于模糊选择，以便在您不知情的情况下将人们推向有害/不受欢迎的产品和服务时，支持客户的目标变得更加困难

blocks.html_en: Making my life harder: It’s more difficult to support my customers’ objectives when technology is designed specifically to obscure choice to push people into harmful/unwelcome products and services later on when you are unaware

sentences.en: Making my life harder: It’s more difficult to support my customers’ objectives when technology is designed specifically to obscure choice to push people into harmful/unwelcome products and services later on when you are unaware
sentences.zh: 让我的生活变得更加困难：当技术专门设计用于模糊选择，以便在您不知情的情况下将人们推向有害/不受欢迎的产品和服务时，支持客户的目标变得更加困难

blocks.html_en: I have been noticing trends

sentences.en: I have been noticing trends
sentences.zh: 我一直在注意趋势

blocks.html_en: Enshitification happens when the customer becomes the product. When attention and information is sold as a product the user experience morphs from something useful to something exploitative.

sentences.en: Enshitification happens when the customer becomes the product.
sentences.zh: 当客户成为产品时，实体化就发生了。

sentences.en: When attention and information is sold as a product the user experience morphs from something useful to something exploitative.
sentences.zh: 当注意力和信息作为产品出售时，用户体验就会从有用的东西变成剥削性的东西。

blocks.html_en: Trend 1: You are no longer the customer (Even though by all appearances it looks that way)

sentences.en: Trend 1: You are no longer the customer (Even though by all appearances it looks that way)
sentences.zh: 趋势一：你不再是顾客（尽管从所有表面看来都是如此）

blocks.html_en: Predatory pricing is an illegal antitrust business strategy where a firm deliberately sets its prices extremely low, often at a loss, to drive existing competitors out of the market or deter new entrants

sentences.en: Predatory pricing is an illegal antitrust business strategy where a firm deliberately sets its prices extremely low, often at a loss, to drive existing competitors out of the market or deter new entrants
sentences.zh: 掠夺性定价是一种非法的反垄断商业策略，公司故意将价格定得极低，通常是亏损的，以将现有竞争对手赶出市场或阻止新进入者

blocks.html_en: Trend 2: Many modern devices are designed with data capture capabilities. This enables manufacturers to operate at a loss harming small businesses who develop safe competing technologies.

sentences.en: Trend 2: Many modern devices are designed with data capture capabilities.
sentences.zh: 趋势2：许多现代设备都设计有数据捕获功能。

sentences.en: This enables manufacturers to operate at a loss harming small businesses who develop safe competing technologies.
sentences.zh: 这使得制造商亏本经营，损害了开发安全竞争技术的小企业。

blocks.html_en: Trend 3: These data-capturing abilities can be used to elicit reactions causing divisiveness with the goal of commodifying our attention

sentences.en: Trend 3: These data-capturing abilities can be used to elicit reactions causing divisiveness with the goal of commodifying our attention
sentences.zh: 趋势 3：这些数据捕获能力可用于引发引起分歧的反应，目的是使我们的注意力商品化

blocks.html_en: Trend 3 Example: We spend energy fighting unwanted features and processes, with those processes being used as data-gathering points of reference to decide how much a person will tolerate

sentences.en: Trend 3 Example: We spend energy fighting unwanted features and processes, with those processes being used as data-gathering points of reference to decide how much a person will tolerate
sentences.zh: 趋势 3 示例：我们花费精力对抗不需要的功能和流程，这些流程被用作数据收集参考点，以决定一个人的容忍程度

blocks.html_en: What I don’t like about modern technologies

sentences.en: What I don’t like about modern technologies
sentences.zh: 我不喜欢现代技术的地方

blocks.html_en: • Smart technologies: Many are designed to steal attention, reduce our ability to understand relationships between our technology, each other, and the world

sentences.en: Smart technologies: Many are designed to steal attention, reduce our ability to understand relationships between our technology, each other, and the world
sentences.zh: 智能技术：许多技术旨在吸引注意力，降低我们理解技术、彼此以及世界之间关系的能力

blocks.html_en: • Companies are using adversarial incentives in hardware design to mine data from private life knowing that it degrades society

sentences.en: Companies are using adversarial incentives in hardware design to mine data from private life knowing that it degrades society
sentences.zh: 公司在硬件设计中使用对抗性激励措施来挖掘私人生活中的数据，因为他们知道这会降低社会质量

blocks.html_en: • These attention stealing methods remain hidden behind End User License Agreements(Consumer Impacting) and Non-Disclosure Contracts(Minimizes Whistle blowing). Makes determining motives difficult.

sentences.en: These attention stealing methods remain hidden behind End User License Agreements(Consumer Impacting) and Non-Disclosure Contracts(Minimizes Whistle blowing).
sentences.zh: 这些窃取注意力的方法仍然隐藏在最终用户许可协议（影响消费者）和保密合同（最大限度地减少举报）背后。

sentences.en: Makes determining motives difficult.
sentences.zh: 使确定动机变得困难。

blocks.html_en: What is Surveillance Capitalism?

sentences.en: What is Surveillance Capitalism?
sentences.zh: 什么是监视资本主义？

blocks.html_en: A business model that mines behavioral data to be packaged into “prediction products”. This data eventually ends up in the hands of commercial predators to influence society for commercial gain.

sentences.en: A business model that mines behavioral data to be packaged into “prediction products”.
sentences.zh: 挖掘行为数据并将其打包成“预测产品”的商业模式。

sentences.en: This data eventually ends up in the hands of commercial predators to influence society for commercial gain.
sentences.zh: 这些数据最终落入商业掠夺者手中，影响社会以获得商业利益。

blocks.html_en: Key Aspects of Surveillance Capitalism

sentences.en: Key Aspects of Surveillance Capitalism
sentences.zh: 监视资本主义的关键方面

blocks.html_en: Behavioral Prediction: Companies like Google and Facebook collect behavioral metadata from activity online.

sentences.en: Behavioral Prediction: Companies like Google and Facebook collect behavioral metadata from activity online.
sentences.zh: 行为预测：Google 和 Facebook 等公司从在线活动中收集行为元数据。

blocks.html_en: Focusing on patterns that reveal information about a user’s habits which is then used later to finger print individuals. The goal is to predict future choices and behaviors.

sentences.en: Focusing on patterns that reveal information about a user’s habits which is then used later to finger print individuals.
sentences.zh: 重点关注揭示用户习惯信息的模式，然后将其用于对个人进行指纹识别。

sentences.en: The goal is to predict future choices and behaviors.
sentences.zh: 目标是预测未来的选择和行为。

blocks.html_en: Behavioral Modification: Beyond predicting, this model often seeks to nudge or modify user behavior for commercial gain, such as driving consumers to specific locations or products. (Minor Example)

sentences.en: Behavioral Modification: Beyond predicting, this model often seeks to nudge or modify user behavior for commercial gain, such as driving consumers to specific locations or products.
sentences.zh: 行为改变：除了预测之外，该模型通常还试图推动或改变用户行为以获取商业利益，例如驾驶消费者前往特定地点或购买特定产品。

sentences.en: (Minor Example)
sentences.zh: （小例子）

blocks.html_en: Ubiquitous Surveillance: Data is harvested not just from online searches, but from smartphones, smart home devices, and wearables.

sentences.en: Ubiquitous Surveillance: Data is harvested not just from online searches, but from smartphones, smart home devices, and wearables.
sentences.zh: 无处不在的监控：数据不仅从在线搜索中收集，还从智能手机、智能家居设备和可穿戴设备中收集。

blocks.html_en: Deliberate Non-Transparency: Typically corporations will hide this illegal activity by not disclosing how their products gather data, leaving users in the dark. Once the damage is done it’s next to impossible to obtain remedy.

sentences.en: Deliberate Non-Transparency: Typically corporations will hide this illegal activity by not disclosing how their products gather data, leaving users in the dark.
sentences.zh: 故意不透明：通常，企业会通过不披露其产品如何收集数据来隐藏这种非法活动，从而使用户蒙在鼓里。

sentences.en: Once the damage is done it’s next to impossible to obtain remedy.
sentences.zh: 一旦造成损害，几乎不可能获得补救。

blocks.html_en: Examples of damage range from bad actors using purchased data to scam victims, to steering election results by gaming social media.

sentences.en: Examples of damage range from bad actors using purchased data to scam victims, to steering election results by gaming social media.
sentences.zh: 损害的例子包括不良行为者使用购买的数据来欺骗受害者，以及通过社交媒体操纵选举结果。

blocks.html_en: Surveillance Capitalism is often described as an “knowledge coup” undermining personal privacy and potentially threatening democratic values by favoring financial interests over individual autonomy.

sentences.en: Surveillance Capitalism is often described as an “knowledge coup” undermining personal privacy and potentially threatening democratic values by favoring financial interests over individual autonomy.
sentences.zh: 监视资本主义通常被描述为“知识政变”，它损害个人隐私，并通过偏爱经济利益而不是个人自治来潜在威胁民主价值观。

blocks.html_en: • These systems don’t necessarily capture your personal information, like name and phone number, to track you (which is how they get around most privacy laws).

sentences.en: These systems don’t necessarily capture your personal information, like name and phone number, to track you (which is how they get around most privacy laws).
sentences.zh: 这些系统不一定会捕获您的个人信息（例如姓名和电话号码）来跟踪您（这是他们绕过大多数隐私法的方式）。

blocks.html_en: • Instead, they build profiles based on your behavior patterns and use that as a fingerprint to engage with you when you are interacting with any of these products or services.

sentences.en: Instead, they build profiles based on your behavior patterns and use that as a fingerprint to engage with you when you are interacting with any of these products or services.
sentences.zh: 相反，他们会根据您的行为模式构建个人资料，并在您与任何这些产品或服务交互时将其用作指纹来与您互动。

blocks.html_en: Famous example: It was found that a teenager purchased pregnancy products around the beginning of her second trimester.

sentences.en: Famous example: It was found that a teenager purchased pregnancy products around the beginning of her second trimester.
sentences.zh: 著名的例子：有人发现，一名青少年在怀孕中期开始时购买了怀孕产品。

blocks.html_en: A prediction model was used to build a profile of her pregnancy. That system was used to mail maternity related advertisements before she told her family she was pregnant.

sentences.en: A prediction model was used to build a profile of her pregnancy.
sentences.zh: 使用预测模型来构建她的怀孕概况。

sentences.en: That system was used to mail maternity related advertisements before she told her family she was pregnant.
sentences.zh: 在她告诉家人她怀孕了之前，该系统被用来邮寄与生育相关的广告。

blocks.html_en: Current applications of this technology

sentences.en: Current applications of this technology
sentences.zh: 该技术目前的应用

blocks.html_en: Cost Subsides: Marketing to powerful advertising companies is one of the ways costs are subsidized to the consumer. Many products are built and deployed by any company wishing to know more about their customers which is why the cost of many technologies over the years are increasingly sold at a loss.

sentences.en: Cost Subsides: Marketing to powerful advertising companies is one of the ways costs are subsidized to the consumer.
sentences.zh: 成本补贴：向强大的广告公司进行营销是向消费者补贴成本的方式之一。

sentences.en: Many products are built and deployed by any company wishing to know more about their customers which is why the cost of many technologies over the years are increasingly sold at a loss.
sentences.zh: 许多产品都是由任何希望更多地了解其客户的公司构建和部署的，这就是为什么多年来许多技术的成本越来越多地亏本出售的原因。

blocks.html_en: Harmful: Creates artificial pricing decreases which has the opposite effect of making competing product prices higher, consolidating power amongst bad actors in the market.

sentences.en: Harmful: Creates artificial pricing decreases which has the opposite effect of making competing product prices higher, consolidating power amongst bad actors in the market.
sentences.zh: 有害：人为地降低价格，从而产生相反的效果，使竞争产品的价格更高，从而巩固市场上不良行为者的权力。

blocks.html_en: The primary focus of designing harmful products is to increase the types and amounts of data collecting inputs

sentences.en: The primary focus of designing harmful products is to increase the types and amounts of data collecting inputs
sentences.zh: 设计有害产品的主要重点是增加数据收集输入的类型和数量

blocks.html_en: Harmful: Products are not designed specifically with your interests in mind. This increases the likelihood that products are designed against your wishes or needs, A feature might be taken away after the purchase, decreasing your freedom and control over the products and services you purchase.

sentences.en: Harmful: Products are not designed specifically with your interests in mind.
sentences.zh: 有害：产品并非专门针对您的利益而设计。

sentences.en: This increases the likelihood that products are designed against your wishes or needs, A feature might be taken away after the purchase, decreasing your freedom and control over the products and services you purchase.
sentences.zh: 这增加了产品是根据您的意愿或需求设计的可能性。购买后某个功能可能会被取消，从而减少您对所购买的产品和服务的自由度和控制力。

blocks.html_en: Benefits of this Technology

sentences.en: Benefits of this Technology
sentences.zh: 这项技术的好处

blocks.html_en: There are some good side effects of these practices: A good example of a possible trade off is driving directions. Mapping service use mobile phones to gauge traffic jams and providing alternative routes.

sentences.en: There are some good side effects of these practices: A good example of a possible trade off is driving directions.
sentences.zh: 这些做法有一些好的副作用： 可能权衡的一个很好的例子是行车路线。

sentences.en: Mapping service use mobile phones to gauge traffic jams and providing alternative routes.
sentences.zh: 地图服务使用手机来测量交通拥堵情况并提供替代路线。

blocks.html_en: But many of these harmful practices involve selling metadata to advertisers, devaluing purchasing power and negatively impacting agency.

sentences.en: But many of these harmful practices involve selling metadata to advertisers, devaluing purchasing power and negatively impacting agency.
sentences.zh: 但其中许多有害做法涉及向广告商出售元数据、贬低购买力并对代理机构产生负面影响。

blocks.html_en: In the long run, when profiles of each customer are created to track future habits, those profiles can be used to take away the power of society. When the product focus is on improving the ability to extract information from society rather than developing new products that improve society, we are all harmed.

sentences.en: In the long run, when profiles of each customer are created to track future habits, those profiles can be used to take away the power of society.
sentences.zh: 从长远来看，当创建每个客户的档案来跟踪未来的习惯时，这些档案可以用来夺走社会的力量。

sentences.en: When the product focus is on improving the ability to extract information from society rather than developing new products that improve society, we are all harmed.
sentences.zh: 当产品的重点是提高从社会获取信息的能力而不是开发改善社会的新产品时，我们都会受到伤害。

blocks.html_en: Closing Thoughts (Awareness and Empowerment)

sentences.en: Closing Thoughts (Awareness and Empowerment)
sentences.zh: 结束语（意识和赋权）

blocks.html_en: Unless we have real representation in our government. Companies don’t have vested interest in protecting privacy.

sentences.en: Unless we have real representation in our government.
sentences.zh: 除非我们在政府中有真正的代表。

sentences.en: Companies don’t have vested interest in protecting privacy.
sentences.zh: 公司在保护隐私方面没有既得利益。

blocks.html_en: Your behavior becomes the resource for first-party companies to design democracy-harming products and keep efforts in the dark about how it shapes our society.

sentences.en: Your behavior becomes the resource for first-party companies to design democracy-harming products and keep efforts in the dark about how it shapes our society.
sentences.zh: 你的行为成为第一方公司设计损害民主的产品的资源，并对其如何塑造我们的社会一无所知。

blocks.html_en: With the right information about behavior, first-party companies can sell their prediction products to governments and political candidates to destabilize online discourse and steer elections.

sentences.en: With the right information about behavior, first-party companies can sell their prediction products to governments and political candidates to destabilize online discourse and steer elections.
sentences.zh: 有了有关行为的正确信息，第一方公司就可以向政府和政治候选人出售其预测产品，以破坏在线言论的稳定并引导选举。

blocks.html_en: Because these companies don’t share what they are doing with this data or how they are developing these products, it takes mistakes from these bad actors to learn how this technology progresses over time.

sentences.en: Because these companies don’t share what they are doing with this data or how they are developing these products, it takes mistakes from these bad actors to learn how this technology progresses over time.
sentences.zh: 由于这些公司不分享他们正在使用这些数据做什么或他们如何开发这些产品，因此需要从这些不良行为者的错误中了解这项技术如何随着时间的推移而进步。

blocks.html_en: If you want to understand how democracy can be shaped in a harmful way over time, see the Facebook–Cambridge Analytica data scandal in the pamphlet for more information about this 2012 data breach.

sentences.en: If you want to understand how democracy can be shaped in a harmful way over time, see the Facebook–Cambridge Analytica data scandal in the pamphlet for more information about this 2012 data breach.
sentences.zh: 如果您想了解民主如何随着时间的推移以有害的方式形成，请参阅小册子中的 Facebook-Cambridge Analytica 数据丑闻，了解有关 2012 年数据泄露事件的更多信息。

blocks.html_en: What we can do

sentences.en: What we can do
sentences.zh: 我们能做什么

blocks.html_en: Behavioral Awareness

sentences.en: Behavioral Awareness
sentences.zh: 行为意识

blocks.html_en: Ultimately, these harms are brought about by our cultural pathologies. Here are some psychological profiles that I think keep these problems going.

sentences.en: Ultimately, these harms are brought about by our cultural pathologies.
sentences.zh: 归根结底，这些危害是由我们的文化病态造成的。

sentences.en: Here are some psychological profiles that I think keep these problems going.
sentences.zh: 我认为以下是一些导致这些问题持续存在的心理特征。

blocks.html_en: [!note] Many of these profiles are cultural problems. They are not easy to resolve. But by changing our behavior, little by little, on an individual level, we can slowly shift the balance.

sentences.en: [!note] Many of these profiles are cultural problems.
sentences.zh: [!note] 其中许多概况都是文化问题。

sentences.en: They are not easy to resolve.
sentences.zh: 它们并不容易解决。

sentences.en: But by changing our behavior, little by little, on an individual level, we can slowly shift the balance.
sentences.zh: 但通过在个人层面上一点一点地改变我们的行为，我们可以慢慢地改变平衡。

blocks.html_en: [!note] Many of these profiles are cultural problems. They are not easy to resolve. But by changing our behavior, little by little, on an individual level, we can slowly shift the balance.

sentences.en: [!note] Many of these profiles are cultural problems.
sentences.zh: [!note] 其中许多概况都是文化问题。

sentences.en: They are not easy to resolve.
sentences.zh: 它们并不容易解决。

sentences.en: But by changing our behavior, little by little, on an individual level, we can slowly shift the balance.
sentences.zh: 但通过在个人层面上一点一点地改变我们的行为，我们可以慢慢地改变平衡。

blocks.html_en: See the Pamphlet for more information on these topics.

sentences.en: See the Pamphlet for more information on these topics.
sentences.zh: 有关这些主题的更多信息，请参阅小册子。

blocks.html_en: Externalizing Responsibility: Refuse to blame other people, parties or systems. Accept responsibility for our part in the problem through our actions or inactions.

sentences.en: Externalizing Responsibility: Refuse to blame other people, parties or systems.
sentences.zh: 将责任外化：拒绝责怪其他人、政党或系统。

sentences.en: Accept responsibility for our part in the problem through our actions or inactions.
sentences.zh: 通过我们的作为或不作为来承担我们在问题中所扮演的角色的责任。

blocks.html_en: Social Norms Acquiescence: Going along with cultural norms that put you in a divisive position of being right and others being wrong, to dominate a person or situation.

sentences.en: Social Norms Acquiescence: Going along with cultural norms that put you in a divisive position of being right and others being wrong, to dominate a person or situation.
sentences.zh: 社会规范默许：顺从文化规范，使你处于对的、别人错的分裂位置，从而主宰一个人或一种情况。

blocks.html_en: Sentimental Behavior Indulgence: Feeding off of outrage emotionally as a way to feel like something is being done, while outwardly doing nothing to decrease the level of harm.

sentences.en: Sentimental Behavior Indulgence: Feeding off of outrage emotionally as a way to feel like something is being done, while outwardly doing nothing to decrease the level of harm.
sentences.zh: 情感行为放纵：在情感上以愤怒为食，感觉好像正在做某事，而表面上却没有采取任何措施来减少伤害程度。

blocks.html_en: Action might look different for each individual. We all come from different walks of life and have different skill sets.

sentences.en: Action might look different for each individual.
sentences.zh: 每个人的行动可能看起来有所不同。

sentences.en: We all come from different walks of life and have different skill sets.
sentences.zh: 我们都来自不同的行业，拥有不同的技能。

blocks.html_en: Responding to National or Regional calls for safety: Calls to support initiatives, or bills to increase security at the expense of freedom, make us less safe. Trading freedom for security reduces our ability to act.

sentences.en: Responding to National or Regional calls for safety: Calls to support initiatives, or bills to increase security at the expense of freedom, make us less safe.
sentences.zh: 响应国家或地区的安全呼吁：呼吁支持倡议，或通过以牺牲自由为代价增强安全的法案，让我们变得不那么安全。

sentences.en: Trading freedom for security reduces our ability to act.
sentences.zh: 用自由换取安全会降低我们的行动能力。

blocks.html_en: Giving our power to act over to people or institutions that may have agendas that run contrary to our own might not be in the best interests of a free society

sentences.en: Giving our power to act over to people or institutions that may have agendas that run contrary to our own might not be in the best interests of a free society
sentences.zh: 将我们的权力交给可能与我们的议程相反的人或机构，可能不符合自由社会的最佳利益

blocks.html_en: Exercise Choice

sentences.en: Exercise Choice
sentences.zh: 运动选择

blocks.html_en: I’m a firm believer that the tools we use shape how we relate to the world. We can decide to stick with tools that circumvent our will to act, or try something new and empowering.

sentences.en: I’m a firm believer that the tools we use shape how we relate to the world.
sentences.zh: 我坚信我们使用的工具塑造了我们与世界的关系。

sentences.en: We can decide to stick with tools that circumvent our will to act, or try something new and empowering.
sentences.zh: 我们可以决定坚持使用那些违背我们行动意愿的工具，或者尝试一些新的、有力量的东西。

blocks.html_en: One of those tools is the software that runs on your computer called the Operating System.

sentences.en: One of those tools is the software that runs on your computer called the Operating System.
sentences.zh: 这些工具之一是在计算机上运行的软件，称为操作系统。

blocks.html_en: • Currently, the Microsoft Windows Operating System has a monopoly on the PC market, but that’s changing. Open Source, Free software (as in Freedom-generating) like Linux has come a long way.

sentences.en: Currently, the Microsoft Windows Operating System has a monopoly on the PC market, but that’s changing.
sentences.zh: 目前，微软Windows操作系统在PC市场上处于垄断地位，但这种情况正在发生变化。

sentences.en: Open Source, Free software (as in Freedom-generating) like Linux has come a long way.
sentences.zh: 像 Linux 这样的开源、自由软件（如自由生成）已经取得了长足的进步。

blocks.html_en: • The Linux Operating System works like Windows or MacOS, without all the junk. Its designed from user-centered and choice perspective.

sentences.en: The Linux Operating System works like Windows or MacOS, without all the junk.
sentences.zh: Linux 操作系统的工作方式与 Windows 或 MacOS 类似，没有任何垃圾。

sentences.en: Its designed from user-centered and choice perspective.
sentences.zh: 它是从以用户为中心和选择的角度来设计的。

blocks.html_en: • Recently, Microsoft and Apple have been designing new versions of Windows and MacOS with AI features.

sentences.en: Recently, Microsoft and Apple have been designing new versions of Windows and MacOS with AI features.
sentences.zh: 最近，微软和苹果一直在设计具有人工智能功能的新版本Windows和MacOS。

blocks.html_en: • In my experience, the way these AI features are designed and forcibly deployed take away user control.

sentences.en: In my experience, the way these AI features are designed and forcibly deployed take away user control.
sentences.zh: 根据我的经验，这些人工智能功能的设计和强制部署方式剥夺了用户的控制权。

blocks.html_en: Certain technologies driven by AI improve many aspects of our lives, especially in the medical industry.

sentences.en: Certain technologies driven by AI improve many aspects of our lives, especially in the medical industry.
sentences.zh: 人工智能驱动的某些技术改善了我们生活的许多方面，尤其是在医疗行业。

blocks.html_en: But without transparency, we don’t have a say in how these technologies impact our lives.

sentences.en: But without transparency, we don’t have a say in how these technologies impact our lives.
sentences.zh: 但如果没有透明度，我们对这些技术如何影响我们的生活就没有发言权。

blocks.html_en: Awareness

sentences.en: Awareness
sentences.zh: 意识

blocks.html_en: Our psychological blind spots can often prevent us from seeing a problem. We don’t want to believe our lives are exploitable.

sentences.en: Our psychological blind spots can often prevent us from seeing a problem.
sentences.zh: 我们的心理盲点常常会让我们看不到问题。

sentences.en: We don’t want to believe our lives are exploitable.
sentences.zh: 我们不想相信我们的生活是可以被利用的。

blocks.html_en: The organizations that engage in harvesting data usually have incentives to operate in the dark despite our inability to see what’s right in front of us, to keep the money flowing.

sentences.en: The organizations that engage in harvesting data usually have incentives to operate in the dark despite our inability to see what’s right in front of us, to keep the money flowing.
sentences.zh: 尽管我们无法看到眼前的情况，但从事数据收集的组织通常有动机在黑暗中运作，以保持资金流动。

blocks.html_en: Knowledge is power: Voicing our concerns with others is powerful. I encourage each of us not to buy into the politically correct belief that we can’t talk about these important topics with one another.

sentences.en: Knowledge is power: Voicing our concerns with others is powerful.
sentences.zh: 知识就是力量：向他人表达我们的担忧是强大的。

sentences.en: I encourage each of us not to buy into the politically correct belief that we can’t talk about these important topics with one another.
sentences.zh: 我鼓励我们每个人都不要相信我们不能互相谈论这些重要话题的政治正确信念。

blocks.html_en: The view that everything is a political ideology is pushed onto society to keep us divided and prevents our ability to organize.

sentences.en: The view that everything is a political ideology is pushed onto society to keep us divided and prevents our ability to organize.
sentences.zh: 一切都是政治意识形态的观点被强加到社会上，使我们保持分裂并阻碍我们的组织能力。

blocks.html_en: At the same time, discourse should be respectful. Having beliefs doesn’t make it right to assume we have all the answers and impose them on others. We need to listen to each other with curiosity, rather than wanting to change each other’s viewpoints.

sentences.en: At the same time, discourse should be respectful.
sentences.zh: 同时，谈话时要尊重对方。

sentences.en: Having beliefs doesn’t make it right to assume we have all the answers and impose them on others.
sentences.zh: 拥有信念并不意味着我们就可以假设我们拥有所有答案并将其强加于他人。

sentences.en: We need to listen to each other with curiosity, rather than wanting to change each other’s viewpoints.
sentences.zh: 我们需要带着好奇心倾听彼此的声音，而不是想要改变彼此的观点。

blocks.html_en: To properly hold these companies accountable and steer them in the right direction, we need a stronger focus on ending Citizens United, and we need active enforcement of antitrust laws.

sentences.en: To properly hold these companies accountable and steer them in the right direction, we need a stronger focus on ending Citizens United, and we need active enforcement of antitrust laws.
sentences.zh: 为了适当地追究这些公司的责任并引导他们走向正确的方向，我们需要更加关注结束公民联合组织，并且我们需要积极执行反垄断法。

blocks.html_en: See the pamphlet for more information on organizations you can support to help make these initiatives happen.

sentences.en: See the pamphlet for more information on organizations you can support to help make these initiatives happen.
sentences.zh: 请参阅小册子，了解有关您可以支持的组织的更多信息，以帮助实现这些举措。

blocks.html_en: It’s been my experience that persistence in supporting a better world, through action, will eventually yield results.

sentences.en: It’s been my experience that persistence in supporting a better world, through action, will eventually yield results.
sentences.zh: 我的经验是，坚持通过行动支持一个更美好的世界，最终会产生成果。

blocks.html_en: We can’t rely on government initiatives to do that for us, especially now; we each need to invest time in making the world a better place if we want to see improvements.

sentences.en: We can’t rely on government initiatives to do that for us, especially now; we each need to invest time in making the world a better place if we want to see improvements.
sentences.zh: 我们不能依靠政府的举措来为我们做到这一点，尤其是现在；如果我们想看到进步，我们每个人都需要投入时间让世界变得更美好。

blocks.html_en: Conclusion

sentences.en: Conclusion
sentences.zh: 结论

blocks.html_en: • Data gathering is a complex problem because we receive many benefits from these technologies in society.

sentences.en: Data gathering is a complex problem because we receive many benefits from these technologies in society.
sentences.zh: 数据收集是一个复杂的问题，因为我们从社会中的这些技术中获得了很多好处。

blocks.html_en: • With the recent lawlessness in our political and corporate institutions, I’m starting to wonder if the benefits are worth the trade-offs.

sentences.en: With the recent lawlessness in our political and corporate institutions, I’m starting to wonder if the benefits are worth the trade-offs.
sentences.zh: 由于最近我们的政治和企业机构无法无天，我开始怀疑这些好处是否值得权衡。

blocks.html_en: If you are interested in learning more about gaining freedom with the technology you use, please scan the QR code on the pamphlet, and I can keep you up to date on future events.

sentences.en: If you are interested in learning more about gaining freedom with the technology you use, please scan the QR code on the pamphlet, and I can keep you up to date on future events.
sentences.zh: 如果您有兴趣了解更多有关利用您所使用的技术获得自由的信息，请扫描小册子上的二维码，我可以让您及时了解未来的活动。

blocks.html_en: Reflections and Questions

sentences.en: Reflections and Questions
sentences.zh: 思考和问题

blocks.html_en: • How does this make you feel?

sentences.en: How does this make you feel?
sentences.zh: 这让你感觉如何？

blocks.html_en: If you can reflect on how you feel about this, we are already making progress.

sentences.en: If you can reflect on how you feel about this, we are already making progress.
sentences.zh: 如果你能反思一下你对此的感受，我们已经取得了进展。

blocks.html_en: • What are some things this tech might be able to predict about you?

sentences.en: What are some things this tech might be able to predict about you?
sentences.zh: 这项技术可以预测你的哪些事情？

blocks.html_en: What are some things this tech might be able to predict about you?

sentences.en: What are some things this tech might be able to predict about you?
sentences.zh: 这项技术可以预测你的哪些事情？

blocks.html_en: • If we don’t like it, what kinds of life changes need to happen?

sentences.en: If we don’t like it, what kinds of life changes need to happen?
sentences.zh: 如果我们不喜欢它，生活需要发生什么样的改变？

blocks.html_en: If we don’t like it, what kinds of life changes need to happen?

sentences.en: If we don’t like it, what kinds of life changes need to happen?
sentences.zh: 如果我们不喜欢它，生活需要发生什么样的改变？

blocks.html_en: • This is not an inevitable extension of Capitalism, but a specific mutation that requires our voice to shape it.

sentences.en: This is not an inevitable extension of Capitalism, but a specific mutation that requires our voice to shape it.
sentences.zh: 这不是资本主义不可避免的延伸，而是一种特殊的突变，需要我们的声音来塑造它。

blocks.html_en: This is not an inevitable extension of Capitalism, but a specific mutation that requires our voice to shape it.

sentences.en: This is not an inevitable extension of Capitalism, but a specific mutation that requires our voice to shape it.
sentences.zh: 这不是资本主义不可避免的延伸，而是一种特殊的突变，需要我们的声音来塑造它。

blocks.html_en: 2026 is going to be a difficult time. Political and social divisiveness is at an all-time high. In this presentation, I explore the pervasiveness of certain consumer products, focusing on the ethical and political ramifications of these products being designed and deployed as a benefit while, at the same time, secretly being used to enrich capitalists and by extension, its partners at the expensive of society.

sentences.en: 2026 is going to be a difficult time.
sentences.zh: 2026 年将是一段艰难的时期。

sentences.en: Political and social divisiveness is at an all-time high.
sentences.zh: 政治和社会分歧空前高涨。

sentences.en: In this presentation, I explore the pervasiveness of certain consumer products, focusing on the ethical and political ramifications of these products being designed and deployed as a benefit while, at the same time, secretly being used to enrich capitalists and by extension, its partners at the expensive of society.
sentences.zh: 在本次演讲中，我探讨了某些消费品的普遍性，重点关注这些产品的道德和政治影响，这些产品被设计和部署为一种利益，同时秘密地被用来让资本家致富，进而让其合作伙伴以社会成本为代价。

blocks.html_en: To help us through this year and to improve our democracy, I advocate for improving education in social and political awareness by drawing on aspects of consciousness that promote self-determination, encouraging people to make informed choices in difficult situations rather than accepting what is.

sentences.en: To help us through this year and to improve our democracy, I advocate for improving education in social and political awareness by drawing on aspects of consciousness that promote self-determination, encouraging people to make informed choices in difficult situations rather than accepting what is.
sentences.zh: 为了帮助我们度过今年并改善我们的民主，我主张通过利用促进自决的意识方面来改善社会和政治意识教育，鼓励人们在困难情况下做出明智的选择，而不是接受现状。

blocks.html_en: This presentation is a primer on the adverse effects of Surveillance Capitalism. Surveillance Capitalism is a system or a set of technologies that aim to glean information from society to profit from individual behavior. Having these systems in place reduces freedom in our society and is a hallmark of Authoritarianism.

sentences.en: This presentation is a primer on the adverse effects of Surveillance Capitalism.
sentences.zh: 本演讲是关于监视资本主义不利影响的入门读物。

sentences.en: Surveillance Capitalism is a system or a set of technologies that aim to glean information from society to profit from individual behavior.
sentences.zh: 监视资本主义是一个系统或一组技术，旨在从社会收集信息以从个人行为中获利。

sentences.en: Having these systems in place reduces freedom in our society and is a hallmark of Authoritarianism.
sentences.zh: 这些制度的到位减少了我们社会的自由，是威权主义的标志。

blocks.html_en: Without awareness and action, all kinds of law-abiding behaviors, like protests, are criminalized by governments and corporations that work together to deploy surveillance technologies in an effort to streamline commerce, or, in worst-case scenarios, steal resources from the public. When technology becomes open to surveillance activities, it becomes easier for criminal actors, in and outside the country, to target the vulnerable, like the elderly and children. Let’s work together to make our societies safer by understanding these threats.

sentences.en: Without awareness and action, all kinds of law-abiding behaviors, like protests, are criminalized by governments and corporations that work together to deploy surveillance technologies in an effort to streamline commerce, or, in worst-case scenarios, steal resources from the public.
sentences.zh: 如果没有意识和行动，各种守法行为（例如抗议）就会被政府和企业定为犯罪，它们共同部署监控技术以简化商业，或者在最坏的情况下窃取公众资源。

sentences.en: When technology becomes open to surveillance activities, it becomes easier for criminal actors, in and outside the country, to target the vulnerable, like the elderly and children.
sentences.zh: 当技术对监视活动开放时，国内外的犯罪分子就更容易瞄准老年人和儿童等弱势群体。

sentences.en: Let’s work together to make our societies safer by understanding these threats.
sentences.zh: 让我们共同努力，通过了解这些威胁来使我们的社会更加安全。

blocks.html_en: Ultimately, these harms are brought about by our cultural pathologies. Here are some psychological profiles that I think keep these problem going (Please note that many of these are cultural problems that we need to, but are not easy to, resolve by changing our behavior, little by little, on an individual level and stop waiting for others to save us):

sentences.en: Ultimately, these harms are brought about by our cultural pathologies.
sentences.zh: 归根结底，这些危害是由我们的文化病态造成的。

sentences.en: Here are some psychological profiles that I think keep these problem going (Please note that many of these are cultural problems that we need to, but are not easy to, resolve by changing our behavior, little by little, on an individual level and stop waiting for others to save us):
sentences.zh: 我认为以下是一些让这些问题继续存在的心理特征（请注意，其中许多是文化问题，我们需要通过在个人层面上一点一点地改变我们的行为来解决，但并不容易，并且不要等待别人来拯救我们）：

blocks.html_en:
• Externalizing Responsibility:
    • Blaming other people and institutions for the cause of the problem and not taking responsibility for our part in creating, or allowing the problem to exist (I.E: choosing to ignore the problem by making excuses that its too hard, or it’s too time consuming to resolve)
    • Marginalizing people you don’t agree with, or that have a different viewpoint/political stance than you by engaging in, or Indulging in weapons of mass distraction: Attacking people that are using politically incorrect wording, or attacking points of view you don’t like. There is a time and place for everything, Not every situation is an excuse to further your political viewpoint and in many cases, this behavior ends up causing divisions and sidelining resolutions

sentences.en: Externalizing Responsibility: Blaming other people and institutions for the cause of the problem and not taking responsibility for our part in creating, or allowing the problem to exist (I.E: choosing to ignore the problem by making excuses that its too hard, or it’s too time consuming to resolve) Marginalizing people you don’t agree with, or that have a different viewpoint/political stance than you by engaging in, or Indulging in weapons of mass distraction: Attacking people that are using politically incorrect wording, or attacking points of view you don’t like.
sentences.zh: 责任外化：将问题的原因归咎于其他人和机构，而不为我们造成问题或允许问题存在承担责任（即：选择通过借口问题太难或解决起来太耗时来忽视问题）通过参与或沉迷于大规模分散注意力的武器来边缘化你不同意的人，或者与你有不同观点/政治立场的人：攻击使用政治不正确的人措辞或攻击你不喜欢的观点。

sentences.en: There is a time and place for everything, Not every situation is an excuse to further your political viewpoint and in many cases, this behavior ends up causing divisions and sidelining resolutions
sentences.zh: 一切都有时间和地点，并非每种情况都是进一步推进政治观点的借口，在许多情况下，这种行为最终会导致分裂并搁置决议

blocks.html_en: • Social Norms Acquiescence: Going along with cultural norms that put you in a divisive position of being right and others being wrong with the aim of dominating a person or situation. Psychologically we are wired to move towards ego stability. When situations present themselves that threaten this stability, we tend to attack the situation or messenger

sentences.en: Social Norms Acquiescence: Going along with cultural norms that put you in a divisive position of being right and others being wrong with the aim of dominating a person or situation.
sentences.zh: 社会规范默许：顺从文化规范，使你处于正确和他人错误的分裂位置，目的是控制一个人或一种情况。

sentences.en: Psychologically we are wired to move towards ego stability.
sentences.zh: 从心理上来说，我们天生就会走向自我稳定。

sentences.en: When situations present themselves that threaten this stability, we tend to attack the situation or messenger
sentences.zh: 当出现威胁这种稳定的情况时，我们倾向于攻击该情况或使者

blocks.html_en: • Sentimental Behavior Indulgence : Feeding off of outrage emotionally as a way to feel like something is being done while outwardly doing nothing to decrease the level of harm. Disregarding external circumstances by refusing to realize that the world is shaped by individual action. Self-righteousness can inadvertently generate cruelty in our society on a large scale. The circumstances around these behaviors might look different for everyone. The important point to be aware of is that difference is an asset for strong societies. We all have varying kinds skills because of our differences. Lets all work together even if we disagree on certain points.

sentences.en: Sentimental Behavior Indulgence : Feeding off of outrage emotionally as a way to feel like something is being done while outwardly doing nothing to decrease the level of harm.
sentences.zh: 情感行为放纵：在情感上以愤怒为食，感觉好像正在做某事，但表面上却没有采取任何行动来减少伤害程度。

sentences.en: Disregarding external circumstances by refusing to realize that the world is shaped by individual action.
sentences.zh: 拒绝认识到世界是由个人行为塑造的，从而忽视外部环境。

sentences.en: Self-righteousness can inadvertently generate cruelty in our society on a large scale.
sentences.zh: 自以为是可能会无意中在我们的社会中造成大规模的残酷。

sentences.en: The circumstances around these behaviors might look different for everyone.
sentences.zh: 对于每个人来说，这些行为的情况可能有所不同。

sentences.en: The important point to be aware of is that difference is an asset for strong societies.
sentences.zh: 需要注意的重要一点是，差异是强大社会的财富。

sentences.en: We all have varying kinds skills because of our differences.
sentences.zh: 由于我们的差异，我们都有不同的技能。

sentences.en: Lets all work together even if we disagree on certain points.
sentences.zh: 即使我们在某些问题上存在分歧，也要让大家一起努力。

blocks.html_en: • Responding to National or Regional calls for safety: By demanding safety, or going along with calls to increase safety from the chaos of the world we make the world more susceptible to authoritarians and therefore more dangerous. Avoid the psychological pull to feel safe during dangerous times. Studies show that the perception of feeling safe promotes a false sense of security and increase a willingness to obey in advance. Calls to support initiatives, or bills to increase security at the expense of freedom falls under this category, makes us less safe and takes individual agency away from people and give it to authoritarian leaders and institutions that may have agendas that run contrary to our own.

sentences.en: Responding to National or Regional calls for safety: By demanding safety, or going along with calls to increase safety from the chaos of the world we make the world more susceptible to authoritarians and therefore more dangerous.
sentences.zh: 响应国家或地区的安全呼声：通过要求安全，或响应提高安全性、避免世界混乱的呼声，我们使世界更容易受到独裁者的影响，从而变得更加危险。

sentences.en: Avoid the psychological pull to feel safe during dangerous times.
sentences.zh: 避免在危险时期感到安全的心理拉动。

sentences.en: Studies show that the perception of feeling safe promotes a false sense of security and increase a willingness to obey in advance.
sentences.zh: 研究表明，安全感会促进错误的安全感，并增加提前服从的意愿。

sentences.en: Calls to support initiatives, or bills to increase security at the expense of freedom falls under this category, makes us less safe and takes individual agency away from people and give it to authoritarian leaders and institutions that may have agendas that run contrary to our own.
sentences.zh: 呼吁支持倡议或以牺牲自由为代价增强安全的法案就属于这一类，它们使我们变得更不安全，并剥夺了人们的个人机构，并将其交给了可能与我们的议程相反的独裁领导人和机构。

content_html_zh:
演讲摘要

这是根据我的工作经验进行的个人驱动的社区演示，内容涉及当前技术形式的影响。 在其中，我认为谷歌和 Facebook 等大公司建立了预测档案，然后将其出售给广告商，广告商随后试图影响个人行为以获取商业/政治利益。 这些商业模式在公众不知情或不同意的情况下悄然重塑了社会。 监视资本主义并不是现代生活不可避免的特征，而是一种特定的、可纠正的情况，需要知情和持续的公民参与才能扭转。

访客须知：我于 2026 年 7 月在我所在的地区亲自介绍了这一点。 我还计划主持该材料的缩放演示。 请参阅本页底部的材料链接并注册参加任何未来的缩放或现场演示。 您可以免费下载和使用此材料，以提高人们对监视资本主义有害影响的认识。 我确实要求您将我列为原作者。

本次演讲的大部分内容都是为了稍微改变我们的想法。 我们的思维方式会对我们希望看到的世界产生重大影响。

人们经常注意到，洗脑最确定的长期结果是一种奇特的愤世嫉俗——绝对拒绝相信任何事情的真相——汉娜·阿伦特

我为什么引用这句话？ 我看到了不想相信任何事情的分裂。 我们可以同意世界现在需要治愈吗？

[！警告] 在我试图论证不受限制的监视资本主义可以被用作引领威权主义运动的工具时，其中一些材料可能会在心理上令人不安。 在适当的条件下，就像我们今天看到的情况一样，任何政党都可能发生破坏性的权力集中，尽管它可能采取不同的形式。

我是谁

  • 我是斯科特·拉尔森。 我是一名计算机专业人士，一直为圣罗莎及周边地区提供服务。
  • 我从 2007 年开始独立帮助人们使用计算机技术。
  • 我写了各种技术形式的优点和缺点及其哲学基础。

我的故事

The Secret Meeting that Changed Rap Music and Destroyed a Generation

大约 20 年前，我读到一位嘻哈博主的文章，其中收到一封匿名信，内容是关于音乐行业高管和发起人之间的一次秘密会议。

这封信的作者因对人为地提升黑帮说唱高于其他嘻哈音乐的计划表示敌意而被赶出了会议，该计划的目的是为我们投资的一些顶级音乐高管建立一条监狱管道。

Article headline about record labels actively recruiting Black men with criminal records to record rap

现在，这个故事大多被认为是一个都市神话。 但如果你回顾一下私人监狱系统的历史，就会发现与该事件时间表有相似之处。

Reddit comment about the "Secret Meeting" story

2019 年，这位 Reddit 评论员也认为那段时间有些不对劲。 当时的其他评论者也讲述了类似的故事。

Queensryche Operation Mindcrime Music Video

回顾我陷入困境的年轻成年岁月，这个说唱音乐故事让我想起了影响我的音乐。 我想知道我对世界的理解是否是由我听的音乐塑造的。

演讲研究：音乐作为表达我们这个时代困难的代际方式。 顺便问一下，我们这个时代是否缺乏政治音乐？

这个故事，无论真实与否，都让我想起了技术无处不在的部分正在发生的事情。 始终在线的系统和服务收集数据，这些数据在我们不知情或未经同意的情况下慢慢地被用来塑造社会。

The Watergate Scandal

1971 年 3 月：丹尼尔·埃尔斯伯格 (Daniel Ellsberg) 公布了五角大楼文件。 尼克松利用自己的职位来追捕他并掩盖事实。 尼克松在公众压力下辞职。

News Photo: Trump on Greenland

现在：据我所知，我们的政府正在非法运作而完全不受惩罚。 国会中的两党都不愿意阻止。

想想我们现在所处的位置……五十年前的位置。

消费主义已经慢慢占据了我们的生活方式。 现在我们面临着一个独裁的政治和金融体系，它共同剥夺本国人民的选举权。

过去 50 年来，消费主义一直在缓慢地影响着社会。 由于我们对如何使用这些数据的了解有限，我们基本上在不知不觉中沿着这条路行驶。

技术伦理

技术伦理涉及：

  • 硬件/软件设计影响：我们的选择和行为如何受到技术设计和实施的影响（技术的设计是为了阻止选择吗？）。
  • 人与技术的关系影响：技术如何影响社会关系（例如：技术的监视方面是否会导致人们不敢说出来？）

在我的职业中我：

  • 对技术进行风险评估：当我发现有害功能时，我会推荐竞争性替代方案，或者就我的担忧向客户提供报告
  • 观察技术如何塑造人类行为：我写的是有害技术如何影响文化和人类机构

  • 第一方=像谷歌或亚马逊这样的公司，为想要向消费者（你）做广告的组织提供与影响力相关的服务
  • 第二方 = 广告商或任何向第一方付费以收集数据以获取利润的机构
  • 第三方=消费者

我为什么要这样做？

（好问题，哈哈 JK）

  • 自由：我喜欢自由地决定我想在计算机上看到什么；推而广之，我希望我的客户也有这样的选择（目前情况并非如此）
  • 责任：我希望技术的设计围绕造福人类而不是毁灭人类的原则。 我希望社会对我们的技术进步有发言权
  • 我关心我女儿的未来：我想为下一代做点什么。
  • 让我的生活变得更加困难：当技术专门设计用于模糊选择，以便在您不知情的情况下将人们推向有害/不受欢迎的产品和服务时，支持客户的目标变得更加困难

我一直在注意趋势

当客户成为产品时，实体化就发生了。 当注意力和信息作为产品出售时，用户体验就会从有用的东西变成剥削性的东西。

趋势一：你不再是顾客（尽管从所有表面看来都是如此）

掠夺性定价是一种非法的反垄断商业策略，公司故意将价格定得极低，通常是亏损的，以将现有竞争对手赶出市场或阻止新进入者

趋势2：许多现代设备都设计有数据捕获功能。 这使得制造商亏本经营，损害了开发安全竞争技术的小企业。

趋势 3：这些数据捕获能力可用于引发引起分歧的反应，目的是使我们的注意力商品化

趋势 3 示例：我们花费精力对抗不需要的功能和流程，这些流程被用作数据收集参考点，以决定一个人的容忍程度

我不喜欢现代技术的地方

  • 智能技术：许多技术旨在吸引注意力，降低我们理解技术、彼此以及世界之间关系的能力
  • 公司在硬件设计中使用对抗性激励措施来挖掘私人生活中的数据，因为他们知道这会降低社会质量
  • 这些窃取注意力的方法仍然隐藏在最终用户许可协议（影响消费者）和保密合同（最大限度地减少举报）背后。 使确定动机变得困难。

什么是监视资本主义？

挖掘行为数据并将其打包成“预测产品”的商业模式。 这些数据最终落入商业掠夺者手中，影响社会以获得商业利益。

监视资本主义的关键方面

行为预测：Google 和 Facebook 等公司从在线活动中收集行为元数据。

重点关注揭示用户习惯信息的模式，然后将其用于对个人进行指纹识别。 目标是预测未来的选择和行为。

行为改变：除了预测之外，该模型通常还试图推动或改变用户行为以获取商业利益，例如驾驶消费者前往特定地点或购买特定产品。 （小例子）

无处不在的监控：数据不仅从在线搜索中收集，还从智能手机、智能家居设备和可穿戴设备中收集。

故意不透明：通常，企业会通过不披露其产品如何收集数据来隐藏这种非法活动，从而使用户蒙在鼓里。 一旦造成损害，几乎不可能获得补救。

损害的例子包括不良行为者使用购买的数据来欺骗受害者，以及通过社交媒体操纵选举结果。

监视资本主义通常被描述为“知识政变”，它损害个人隐私，并通过偏爱经济利益而不是个人自治来潜在威胁民主价值观。

  • 这些系统不一定会捕获您的个人信息（例如姓名和电话号码）来跟踪您（这是他们绕过大多数隐私法的方式）。
  • 相反，他们会根据您的行为模式构建个人资料，并在您与任何这些产品或服务交互时将其用作指纹来与您互动。

著名的例子：有人发现，一名青少年在怀孕中期开始时购买了怀孕产品。

使用预测模型来构建她的怀孕概况。 在她告诉家人她怀孕了之前，该系统被用来邮寄与生育相关的广告。

该技术目前的应用

成本补贴：向强大的广告公司进行营销是向消费者补贴成本的方式之一。 许多产品都是由任何希望更多地了解其客户的公司构建和部署的，这就是为什么多年来许多技术的成本越来越多地亏本出售的原因。

有害：人为地降低价格，从而产生相反的效果，使竞争产品的价格更高，从而巩固市场上不良行为者的权力。

设计有害产品的主要重点是增加数据收集输入的类型和数量

有害：产品并非专门针对您的利益而设计。 这增加了产品是根据您的意愿或需求设计的可能性。购买后某个功能可能会被取消，从而减少您对所购买的产品和服务的自由度和控制力。

这项技术的好处

这些做法有一些好的副作用： 可能权衡的一个很好的例子是行车路线。 地图服务使用手机来测量交通拥堵情况并提供替代路线。

但其中许多有害做法涉及向广告商出售元数据、贬低购买力并对代理机构产生负面影响。

从长远来看，当创建每个客户的档案来跟踪未来的习惯时，这些档案可以用来夺走社会的力量。 当产品的重点是提高从社会获取信息的能力而不是开发改善社会的新产品时，我们都会受到伤害。

结束语（意识和赋权）

除非我们在政府中有真正的代表。 公司在保护隐私方面没有既得利益。

你的行为成为第一方公司设计损害民主的产品的资源，并对其如何塑造我们的社会一无所知。

有了有关行为的正确信息，第一方公司就可以向政府和政治候选人出售其预测产品，以破坏在线言论的稳定并引导选举。

由于这些公司不分享他们正在使用这些数据做什么或他们如何开发这些产品，因此需要从这些不良行为者的错误中了解这项技术如何随着时间的推移而进步。

如果您想了解民主如何随着时间的推移以有害的方式形成，请参阅小册子中的 Facebook-Cambridge Analytica 数据丑闻，了解有关 2012 年数据泄露事件的更多信息。

我们能做什么

行为意识

归根结底，这些危害是由我们的文化病态造成的。 我认为以下是一些导致这些问题持续存在的心理特征。

[!note] 其中许多概况都是文化问题。 它们并不容易解决。 但通过在个人层面上一点一点地改变我们的行为，我们可以慢慢地改变平衡。

有关这些主题的更多信息，请参阅小册子。

将责任外化：拒绝责怪其他人、政党或系统。 通过我们的作为或不作为来承担我们在问题中所扮演的角色的责任。

社会规范默许：顺从文化规范，使你处于对的、别人错的分裂位置，从而主宰一个人或一种情况。

情感行为放纵：在情感上以愤怒为食，感觉好像正在做某事，而表面上却没有采取任何措施来减少伤害程度。

每个人的行动可能看起来有所不同。 我们都来自不同的行业，拥有不同的技能。

响应国家或地区的安全呼吁：呼吁支持倡议，或通过以牺牲自由为代价增强安全的法案，让我们变得不那么安全。 用自由换取安全会降低我们的行动能力。

将我们的权力交给可能与我们的议程相反的人或机构，可能不符合自由社会的最佳利益

运动选择

我坚信我们使用的工具塑造了我们与世界的关系。 我们可以决定坚持使用那些违背我们行动意愿的工具，或者尝试一些新的、有力量的东西。

这些工具之一是在计算机上运行的软件，称为操作系统。

  • 目前，微软Windows操作系统在PC市场上处于垄断地位，但这种情况正在发生变化。 像 Linux 这样的开源、自由软件（如自由生成）已经取得了长足的进步。
  • Linux 操作系统的工作方式与 Windows 或 MacOS 类似，没有任何垃圾。 它是从以用户为中心和选择的角度来设计的。

  • 最近，微软和苹果一直在设计具有人工智能功能的新版本Windows和MacOS。
  • 根据我的经验，这些人工智能功能的设计和强制部署方式剥夺了用户的控制权。

人工智能驱动的某些技术改善了我们生活的许多方面，尤其是在医疗行业。

但如果没有透明度，我们对这些技术如何影响我们的生活就没有发言权。

意识

我们的心理盲点常常会让我们看不到问题。 我们不想相信我们的生活是可以被利用的。

尽管我们无法看到眼前的情况，但从事数据收集的组织通常有动机在黑暗中运作，以保持资金流动。

知识就是力量：向他人表达我们的担忧是强大的。 我鼓励我们每个人都不要相信我们不能互相谈论这些重要话题的政治正确信念。

一切都是政治意识形态的观点被强加到社会上，使我们保持分裂并阻碍我们的组织能力。

同时，谈话时要尊重对方。 拥有信念并不意味着我们就可以假设我们拥有所有答案并将其强加于他人。 我们需要带着好奇心倾听彼此的声音，而不是想要改变彼此的观点。

为了适当地追究这些公司的责任并引导他们走向正确的方向，我们需要更加关注结束公民联合组织，并且我们需要积极执行反垄断法。

请参阅小册子，了解有关您可以支持的组织的更多信息，以帮助实现这些举措。

我的经验是，坚持通过行动支持一个更美好的世界，最终会产生成果。

我们不能依靠政府的举措来为我们做到这一点，尤其是现在；如果我们想看到进步，我们每个人都需要投入时间让世界变得更美好。

结论

  • 数据收集是一个复杂的问题，因为我们从社会中的这些技术中获得了很多好处。
  • 由于最近我们的政治和企业机构无法无天，我开始怀疑这些好处是否值得权衡。

如果您有兴趣了解更多有关利用您所使用的技术获得自由的信息，请扫描小册子上的二维码，我可以让您及时了解未来的活动。

思考和问题

  • 这让你感觉如何？

如果你能反思一下你对此的感受，我们已经取得了进展。

  • 这项技术可以预测你的哪些事情？
  • 如果我们不喜欢它，生活需要发生什么样的改变？
  • 这不是资本主义不可避免的延伸，而是一种特殊的突变，需要我们的声音来塑造它。

思考和问题

概要

我是一名计算机专业人士，自 2007 年以来一直为圣罗莎及周边地区提供服务。 我拥有研究解决硬件/软件问题以及撰写有关技术的利弊的技能。

2026 年将是一段艰难的时期。 政治和社会分歧空前高涨。 在本次演讲中，我探讨了某些消费品的普遍性，重点关注这些产品的道德和政治影响，这些产品被设计和部署为一种利益，同时秘密地被用来让资本家致富，进而让其合作伙伴以社会成本为代价。

为了帮助我们度过今年并改善我们的民主，我主张通过利用促进自决的意识方面来改善社会和政治意识教育，鼓励人们在困难情况下做出明智的选择，而不是接受现状。

概括

本演讲是关于监视资本主义不利影响的入门读物。 监视资本主义是一个系统或一组技术，旨在从社会收集信息以从个人行为中获利。 这些制度的到位减少了我们社会的自由，是威权主义的标志。

如果没有意识和行动，各种守法行为（例如抗议）就会被政府和企业定为犯罪，它们共同部署监控技术以简化商业，或者在最坏的情况下窃取公众资源。 当技术对监视活动开放时，国内外的犯罪分子就更容易瞄准老年人和儿童等弱势群体。 让我们共同努力，通过了解这些威胁来使我们的社会更加安全。

行为意识

归根结底，这些危害是由我们的文化病态造成的。 我认为以下是一些让这些问题继续存在的心理特征（请注意，其中许多是文化问题，我们需要通过在个人层面上一点一点地改变我们的行为来解决，但并不容易，并且不要等待别人来拯救我们）：

  • 责任外化：将问题的原因归咎于其他人和机构，而不为我们造成问题或允许问题存在承担责任（即：选择通过借口问题太难或解决起来太耗时来忽视问题）通过参与或沉迷于大规模分散注意力的武器来边缘化你不同意的人，或者与你有不同观点/政治立场的人：攻击使用政治不正确的人措辞或攻击你不喜欢的观点。 一切都有时间和地点，并非每种情况都是进一步推进政治观点的借口，在许多情况下，这种行为最终会导致分裂并搁置决议
  • 社会规范默许：顺从文化规范，使你处于正确和他人错误的分裂位置，目的是控制一个人或一种情况。 从心理上来说，我们天生就会走向自我稳定。 当出现威胁这种稳定的情况时，我们倾向于攻击该情况或使者
  • 情感行为放纵：在情感上以愤怒为食，感觉好像正在做某事，但表面上却没有采取任何行动来减少伤害程度。 拒绝认识到世界是由个人行为塑造的，从而忽视外部环境。 自以为是可能会无意中在我们的社会中造成大规模的残酷。 对于每个人来说，这些行为的情况可能有所不同。 需要注意的重要一点是，差异是强大社会的财富。 由于我们的差异，我们都有不同的技能。 即使我们在某些问题上存在分歧，也要让大家一起努力。
  • 响应国家或地区的安全呼声：通过要求安全，或响应提高安全性、避免世界混乱的呼声，我们使世界更容易受到独裁者的影响，从而变得更加危险。 避免在危险时期感到安全的心理拉动。 研究表明，安全感会促进错误的安全感，并增加提前服从的意愿。 呼吁支持倡议或以牺牲自由为代价增强安全的法案就属于这一类，它们使我们变得更不安全，并剥夺了人们的个人机构，并将其交给了可能与我们的议程相反的独裁领导人和机构。

可能的解决方案

我们当前的政治和文化氛围正在加速这项技术，以及如何利用它来监视社会并剥夺选择权。 随着互联网的出现，这种情况开始发生，并随着人工智能的发展而急剧增加。

汉娜·阿伦特政治与人文中心最近发布了一篇关于这个问题的有趣文章（https://medium.com/amor-mundi/expropriation-notes-on-the-revolution-to-come-1e4de79a693b），我认为该文章有可能改善我们的情况。

问题是我们已经失去了说话和被倾听的能力，如果我们希望恢复这些条件，我们需要组建以人们共同行动的经验为基础的委员会。
